dod_met: `railway_lakehouse.spark_jobs.coverage` reads the real Gold Parquet and writes `output/evidence/spark/manifest.json` plus `coverage_by_geo_year/`.
Manifest records Spark 4.1.2, JDK 21.0.11, input 2968x4, output 2968x5, files written, partitions, duration, UTC timestamps, and `status=passed`.
`[spark]` extra is pinned to `pyspark==4.1.*` and `delta-spark==4.1.*`; S3A remains Maven coordinates via `spark_config`.
Spark tests build temp Gold inputs under `tmp_path` and skip when PySpark is absent.
Docs, dashboard, gap register, verification docs, research record, and progress logs are synced.
Raw Bronze untouched; numeric Gold values are read verbatim and aggregated deterministically.
notes: Commit `c85e5a2` pushed. PR #19 is open, non-draft, MERGEABLE, and dashboard-sync-reminder completed successfully. Spark verification used PySpark 4.1.2 with JDK 21 and native Windows `HADOOP_HOME=tmp/hadoop-3.4.0-win10-x64`.
